title: USA Rare Earth to buy Brazil's Serra Verde for $2.8 billion to build supply outside Asia
summary_full: USA Rare Earth on Monday announced plans to buy Brazilian rare earths miner Serra Verde in a deal worth $2.8 billion in cash and shares.
summary_public: USA Rare Earth on Monday announced plans to buy Brazilian rare earths miner Serra Verde in a deal worth $2.8 billion in cash and shares.
